ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "country_of_listing" TEXT /* Country where the stock is listed */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "margin_rate" REAL /* Margin rate required for trading the stock */,
  "go_short" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the stock is eligible for short selling */,
  "limited_risk_premium" REAL /* Limited risk premium associated with the stock */,
  "historical_data_available" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether historical data is available for the stock */,
  "short_interest_ratio" REAL /* Short interest ratio of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_country_of_listing FOREIGN KEY ("country_of_listing") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "market_regulator" TEXT /* Name of the market regulator */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading parameter */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the trading parameters */,
  "trading_type" TEXT /* Type of trading (e.g., long, short, margin) */,
  "minimum_trade_size" REAL /* Minimum trade size allowed */,
  "maximum_trade_size" REAL /* Maximum trade size allowed */,
  "liquidity_rating" TEXT /* Liquidity rating of the stock */,
  "volatility_index" REAL /* Volatility index of the stock */,
  "trade_margin" REAL /* Margin required for trading the stock */,
  "short_sale_ratio" REAL /* Short sale ratio of the stock */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of trading */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_parameters_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_historical_data" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stock_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the stock (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "stock_id")
)
